description: Firewall test VM B — client in testAllowB zone (used by firewall/test.sh --deep). Exercises both module-name peers AND module-local alias references.

ingress.description: Module-name peer — exercises FQDN host alias (tappaas_module_test_fw_a)
Module-local alias peer — exercises alias resolution from module.aliases

egress.description: Egress to module-name peer (return-path tests use this)
Egress to global alias (RFC1918 DNS) — exercises global aliases.json

test_admin_ips.description: Pretend admin IPs from testAllowA — module-local alias used in ingress to validate alias compilation
